pi_items.source: Task setup script copies the downloaded Vcomb.fits image to m12_vband.fits
Export result script reads measurements from growth_curve_results.txt
Task setup script generates ground truth measurements specifically for these radii, matching the task description

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real observation data of Messier 12 (NGC 6218) taken by the ESO-VLT-U1 telescope using the FORS1 instrument. The target image is copied to m12_vband.fits. The agent is expected to perform aperture photometry on a target star at radii of 5, 8, 12, 16, 20, 25, and 30 pixels, and output the growth curve to growth_curve_results.txt.
